name: Ronnie Verrell
abstract: Ronald Thomas Verrell (21 February 1926 – 22 February 2002) was an English jazz drummer. He played in two of the United Kingdom's "most famous" big bands, the Ted Heath Orchestra and the Syd Lawrence Orchestra.

about_quotes.speaker: Dan D'Imperio
about_quotes.evidence: But what was even more impressive, or as impressive, was a Ted Heath record called “Live at the London Palladium” and the drummer was Ronnie Verrell. And to this day when I play that record I get excited.

about_quotes.speaker: Sonny Igoe
about_quotes.evidence: Ronnie Verrell was the drummer, an English drummer for the group in the band in London, and he was a marvelous drummer.
about_quotes.doc_title: Sonny Igoe interviewed by Monk Rowe, Emerson, New Jersey, July 31, 2003
